message:
fix(freeze): support closure forward references with shared var_refs

When frozen functions create closures, captured variables assigned after
the closure creation were not visible inside the closure. This broke
JavaScript patterns like function hoisting where a closure captures a
function defined later in the same scope.

The fix implements V2 closure creation with shared var_refs:

- Add _locals_jsv shadow array (JSValue) mirroring CompressedValue locals
- Sync _locals_jsv after every put_loc/set_loc that modifies a local
- Add detach call before return to copy values from _locals_jsv to var_refs
- Fix order: detach BEFORE freeing locals (var_refs point to _locals_jsv)

Changes:
- Add has_fclosure tracking for functions with fclosure/fclosure8 ops
- Add createClosureV2 Zig bindings and ListHead type
- Add _locals_jsv sync to all set_loc/put_loc handlers
- Add detach calls to all return handlers (helper functions + inline)
- Add test case: test-npm/zod/closure_forward.js
